daily.today_energy: Mercury's dancing in your sector of self-expression, Sag. You're giving main character energy today—lean into it. Your vibe is magnetic and authentic, so don't dim yourself down for anyone.
daily.love: Whether single or coupled up, your words have power rn. Say what you actually mean. If you've been sitting on feelings, the universe is basically nudging you to speak your truth. Vulnerability hits different today.
daily.career: Your creative problem-solving is *chef's kiss* right now. That project you've been stuck on? Fresh perspective incoming. Trust your instincts—they're unusually sharp. This is your moment to pitch that idea.
daily.health: Your nervous system wants grounding rn. Try spending time outside or doing something with your hands. Your energy peaks when you're moving intentionally, so a walk or gentle workout will realign you beautifully.

weekly.overview: This week invites you to lean into curiosity and exploration. A shift in energy mid-week opens doors you didn't know existed. Trust your gut when it whispers—it's been pretty solid lately, honestly.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or single, emotional authenticity is your superpower rn. Someone might surprise you with realness that cuts through the noise. Don't overthink it; just vibe with what feels genuine.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different this week. If you've been sitting on a project or thought, now's the moment to share it. Recognition might not come instantly, but momentum is definitely building in your favor.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for movement and fresh air—listen to that call. Energy peaks mid-week, so schedule anything important then. Sleep matters more than you think rn; prioritize rest as seriously as you do productivity.
